title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 23 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the iron ore market showed a volatile but firm trend, with the main contract I2605 closing at 795 yuan/ton,up 1.21% from the previous trading day. Spot prices increased by approximately 5-7 yuan/ton compared to the previous day. This week, pre-holiday restocking demand has gradually started to emerge.
